Against: 1- Hussein Abdullah Maradhi Al-Rashidi . 2- Undersecretary of the Ministry of Justice for Real Estate Registration and Documentation Affairs, in his capacity. 3- Director of the Execution Department , in his capacity. Property Description: (According to the attached description certificate ) Property document No. 2022/3834 located in Al-Firdous area - Plot No. 327 - Block No. 5 - with an area of 36874 m² and 301 m², by public auction with a base price of 230,000 K.D. (Two Hundred Thirty Thousand Kuwaiti Dinars ). ** According to the description certificate : That the property is a private residence consisting of a ground floor + first floor + roof, and there are violations regarding an increase in the building percentage on the roof towards the alleyway and the roof bridge, report No. 14406. ** According to the expert's report : The disputed property located in Al-Firdous area, Block (5), Street (1), Avenue (6), Plot (327), House (26), with an area of 301 m², where the inspection was conducted as follows: The disputed property is a private residence house with an area of (301 square meters) according to document (3834). The property consists of a ground floor + first floor and a roof. The property is located on a single street and a transformer alleyway , and the exterior cladding is made of bricks. It is adjacent to neighbors on the right side, and on the other side, there is an electricity alleyway . - The expert team knocked on the door, but it was not opened. *Inspection:* On 2023/3/8, we moved to and inspected the property subject of the lawsuit on site, located in Qurtuba Area, Plot (2), Street (3), Avenue (4), House (38), bearing automated number (90482719), in the presence and guidance of the plaintiff's agent and the first defendant, and in the presence of Mr. Expert of Knowledge / Osama Al-Ruwaieh at the time of inspection, as follows: - The disputed property is a residential plot consisting of a basement, ground floor, first floor, and roof, covered with Jordanian stone, and located on two streets (corner). - The disputed property conforms to document number 2022/683 and has an area of 587.5 square meters. - The first defendant provided information on the property's components as follows: 1- The basement consists of a hall + 2 bedrooms + bathroom + office room. 2- The ground floor consists of a hall and reception area + bathroom + refrigerator storage + main kitchen + driver's room with bathroom in the yard and a diwaniya with bathroom. 3- The first mezzanine consists of 3 bedrooms + 2 bathrooms. 4- The first floor consists of a hall + bedroom + bathroom + kitchen. 5- The second mezzanine consists of 4 bedrooms + bathroom. 6- The roof consists of two bedrooms for workers + bathroom + storage. 7- Central air conditioning. Secondly: Auction Terms: First: The auction shall commence with a base price of K.D. 720,000 (Seven Hundred and Twenty Thousand Kuwaiti Dinars ). Participation in the auction requires payment of at least one-fifth of that price by a certified check from the drawee bank or by a letter of guarantee from one of the banks in favor of the Enforcement Department at the Ministry of Justice . Second: Whoever's bid is approved by the judge must deposit the full approved price, expenses, and registration fees at the time of the sale session. Third: If the bidder whose bid was approved does not deposit the full price, they must deposit at least one-fifth of the price; otherwise, the bidding will be re-opened at their expense in the same session based on the price at which the sale was previously awarded. Fourth: If the bidder deposits the price in the subsequent session, the auction will be awarded to them, unless someone comes forward in that session willing to purchase with a ten percent increase, accompanied by the deposit of the full auction price. In this case, the bidding will be re-opened in the same session based on this new price. Fifth: If the first bidder fails to deposit the full price in the subsequent session and no one comes forward to bid with a ten percent increase, the bidding will immediately be re-opened at their expense based on the price at which it was awarded to them in the previous session. In this session, no bid not accompanied by a full deposit of its value will be considered. The defaulting bidder is obligated to pay from the property. Sixth: In all cases, the successful bidder shall bear the transfer and property registration fees, enforcement procedure expenses amounting to K.D. 200, legal and expert fees, and advertising and publication costs for the sale in daily newspapers. Seventh: This announcement shall be published according to the law, and those directly involved in the sale procedures shall be responsible for them, without the Clerk's Office at the General Court bearing any responsibility. Eighth: The successful bidder acknowledges that they have inspected the property in a manner that negates any ignorance. Notice: 1- This sale announcement shall be published in the Official Gazette according to Article 266 of the Code of Civil Procedure . 2- The auction award judgment is appealable within seven days from the date of its pronouncement, according to Article 277 of the Code of Civil Procedure . 3- The last paragraph of Article 276 of the Code of Civil Procedure states that "If the expropriated owner is residing in the property, they shall remain in it as a tenant by force of law, and the successful bidder is obligated to draw up a lease agreement in their favor at a fair market rent." President of the General Court

chunks.title: Announcement of Real Estate Sale by Public Auction
chunks.text_en: The Clerk's Office at the General Court announces the public auction of the property described below, on Thursday, 2025/5/1 – 52 – on the second floor of the Palace of Justice at 9:00 AM – in execution of the court judgment issued in lawsuit No. 2023/664 Sales/3. Filed by: Abdullah Nasser Abdullah Al-Saq'i Against: 1- Bader Nasser Abdullah Al-Saq'i . 2- Saq'ab Nasser Abdullah Al-Saq'i . 3- Suheil Nasser Abdullah Al-Saq'i . 4- Yasmin Nasser Abdullah Al-Saq'i . 5- Budour Nasser Abdullah Al-Saq'i . 6- Saad Nasser Abdullah Al-Saq'i . 7- Mahasin Nasser Abdullah Al-Saq'i . 8- Kawkab Saad Al-Din Dhawi First: Property Description according to the attached Certificate of Description. - Property of document No. 2022/683 located in Qurtuba – Plot 712 – Block 2 – from plan No. M/32992 – with an area of 587.5 m2. Note: According to the Municipality's letter, the property consists of a basement, ground floor + first floor + part of the second floor + roof, and the property does not conform to the plans, and there are no attached plans for the floor The flooring in the property on the ground floor was changed from marble ceramic, and ceramic in the upper floors. The air conditioning is central, and there is no elevator in the property. The second defendant, Faisal , stated that the beneficiaries of the property are as follows: on the ground floor is the defendant Sheikha ; on the first floor is the defendant Khalid and his family in the apartment, and in the suite is the defendant Abeer ; on the second floor is the defendant Faisal and his family and their brother/Hussein and the defendant Munira . He also stated that the plaintiffs do not reside in the property. Secondly: Auction Terms: First: The auction shall commence with a base price of 324,000 K.D. (Three Hundred Twenty-Four Thousand Kuwaiti Dinars ). Participation in the auction requires payment of at least one-fifth of the price by a certified check from the drawee bank or by a letter of guarantee from one of the banks in favor of the Enforcement Department at the Ministry of Justice . Second: Whoever's bid is approved by the judge must deposit the full approved price, expenses, and registration fees at the time of the sale session. Third: If the bidder whose bid was approved does not deposit the full price, they must deposit at least one-fifth of the price; otherwise, the bidding will be re-opened at their expense in the same session based on the price at which the sale was previously awarded. Fourth: If the bidder deposits the price in the subsequent session, the auction will be awarded to them, unless someone comes forward in that session willing to purchase with a ten percent increase, accompanied by the deposit of the full price. In this case, the bidding will be re-opened in the same session based on this new price. Fifth: If the first bidder fails to deposit the full price in the subsequent session and no one comes forward to bid with the ten percent increase, the bidding will immediately be re-opened at their expense based on the price at which it was awarded to them in the previous session. In this session, no bid not accompanied by the deposit of its full value will be considered. The defaulting bidder shall be liable for any shortfall in the property's price. Sixth: In all cases, the successful bidder shall bear the transfer and registration fees for ownership, enforcement procedure expenses amounting to 200 K.D., legal and expert fees, and advertising and publication costs for the sale in daily newspapers. Seventh: This announcement shall be published in accordance with the law, and those directly involved in the sale procedures shall be responsible for them, without the Clerk's Office at the General Court bearing any responsibility. Eighth: The successful bidder acknowledges that they have inspected the property in a manner that negates any ignorance. Notice: 1- This sale announcement shall be published in the Official Gazette in accordance with Article 266 of the Code of Civil Procedure . 2- The auction award judgment is appealable within seven days from the date of its pronouncement, in accordance with Article 277 of the Code of Civil Procedure . 3- The last paragraph of Article 276 of the Code of Civil Procedure states that "If the dispossessed owner is residing in the property, they shall remain in it as a tenant by operation of law, and the successful bidder shall be obligated to draw up a lease contract in their favor at a fair market rent." President of the General Court Announcement of Public Auction for Property Sale The Clerk's Office at the General Court announces the public auction of the property described below, on Thursday, 2025/5/1 – Hall 52 – on the second floor of the Palace of Justice at 9:00 AM – in execution of the court judgment issued in lawsuit No. 2023/741 Sales/3. Filed by: - 1- Shurooq Abdullah Suhaim Al-Hajri . - 2- Mai Abdullah Suhaim Al-Hajri . Against: - 1- Sheikha Fahad Saqr . - 2- Faisal Abdullah Suhaim Al-Hajri . - 3- Khalid Abdullah Suhaim Al-Hajri . - 4- Munira Abdullah Suhaim Al-Hajri . - 5- Abeer Abdullah Suhaim Al-Hajri . - 6- Masha'el Abdullah Suhaim Al-Hajri . - 7- Nouf Abdullah Suhaim Al-Hajri . - 8- Kuwait Credit Bank First: Property Description according to the attached Certificate of Description. Property Document No. 1995/9308 located in Jaber Al-Ali – Plot 74 – Block 1 – from Plan No. M/36966 – with an area of 392 m². *Note : There is a major violation on the rooftop. *Inspection : The expert team moved on 2023/9/18 to the disputed property located in Jaber Al-Ali Suburb, Block 1, Street 3, House 7, Plot 74, with an area of 392 square meters, in the presence and guidance of the plaintiffs' agent, the second defendant Faisal Al-Hajri , and Mr. Osama Al-Ruwaieh , the knowledge expert, as shown in (Attachment 1 – Inspection Report No. (8)). Inspection details as follows: The auctioned property is a house located on a street, with an orange-yellow limestone facade, and has two entrances from the street, one for the diwaniya and the other for the house courtyard. The property is relatively old. The second defendant, Faisal , allowed the expert team to enter and inspect the property, and the inspection was as follows: - The ground floor consists of a living room, a bedroom, a sitting room, a staircase, a main kitchen, a dining room, and a bathroom, and from the outside, a diwaniya with washbasins and a bathroom. - The first floor consists of a suite with 2 rooms and 2 bathrooms, and an apartment with 3 rooms, 2 bathrooms, and a hall. - The second floor, according to the defendant's statement, is identical to the first floor. The expert team was unable to inspect it due to the presence of the family, but it was found from the plans submitted to the expert team that it is identical to the first floor. - Rooftop: It has a small structure consisting of a room and a bathroom, used for household transactions. Announcement of Public Auction for Property Sale The Clerk's Office at the General Court announces the public auction of the property described below, on Thursday, 2025/5/1 – Hall 52 – on the second floor of the Palace of Justice at 9:00 AM – in execution of the court judgment issued in lawsuit No. 2022/775 Sales/3. President of the General Court - **Auction No. (2459):** Document for the sale of filters – furniture – steel – printing press – computers and their accessories – equipment and insulation – chalets – batteries – iron spools – wooden spools – meters and fire functions. The bidder shall sign, upon receiving the terms and conditions booklet, a declaration and undertaking to adhere to the specified deadlines for submitting the offer to the Central Sales Committee at the Ministry of Finance . According to the following information: 1- Location for receiving the terms and conditions booklet and submitting the auction participation offer: Warehouses Department – Subaihan Warehouses from 2025/4/6 until 2025/4/10. Documents are to be handed over upon payment of a non-refundable fee of (300) Kuwaiti Dinars payable via K-Net (at the Treasury of the Ministry of Electricity, Water, and Renewable Energy – South Surra – Accounts Department – Treasury Section, Ground Floor), noting that two separate documents will be sold: 2- Opening of envelopes and holding of the auction on Sunday, 2025/4/13, at the Ministry of Finance – Ministries Complex – Block 12 – Third Floor. (m) for the provision of cleaning workers for Amiri vehicles for the year 2025 The Amiri Diwan announces the offering of General Practice No. (764/D.M) for the provision of cleaning workers for Amiri vehicles for the year 2025. Those wishing to participate from specialized companies or establishments in this field should apply to obtain the booklet of terms and conditions and practice documents during official working hours from (Amiri Diwan – Bayan Palace – Administrative Building – First Floor – Zone (7) - Tenders and Follow-up Department) during official working hours, starting from the date of publication of the announcement in the Official Gazette (Al-Kuwait Al-Youm ), for a non-refundable fee of (75 K.D. ) only seventy-five Kuwaiti Dinars (K-Net payment only) for the booklet. Owners of small and medium enterprises are exempted from these fees (with submission of the relevant certificate), starting from Sunday, 06/04/2025, from 8:30 AM until 1:00 PM, with consideration of the following: * The deadline for submitting bids is 1:30 PM on Thursday, 17/04/2025. No bids will be accepted after this deadline. * Bids must be submitted in a sealed envelope to the Tenders and Follow-up Department - Bayan Palace – Administrative Building – First Floor – Zone 7. * Submission of a preliminary guarantee of not less than (2%) in favor of the Amiri Diwan in the form of a letter of guarantee or a certified check from one of the Kuwaiti banks, valid throughout the bid validity period, which is (90) days. * Submission of a valid certificate of compliance with national labor percentage and a valid tax compliance certificate. * An authorization letter and a copy of the civil ID for the company representative to purchase the practice document. * This practice is indivisible, and alternative offers are not permitted. * The bidder must submit a letter attached with a copy of the registration certificate from the Kuwait Chamber of Commerce and Industry . * The preliminary meeting date is Thursday, 10/04/2025, at 11:00 AM. The bid must remain valid for (90) days from the closing date, while the Amiri Diwan reserves its right to extend or renew this period for the period(s) it deems appropriate to complete the award procedures. For inquiries, please contact the following numbers: Direct: 22011412 / 22011438 Email: nt.aldoweesh@da.gov.kw sa.alhasawi@da.gov.kw Undersecretary for Financial, Administrative, and Staff Affairs Auction Announcement No. (2460) The Ministry of Finance announces the sale of a Lexus LS460L 2010 model vehicle, out of service, by sealed envelope auction, according to the following details: 1- Location for receiving the terms and conditions booklet and auction participation offer: Ministries Complex – Ministry of Finance – Block 11 – Claims and Collections Department – Ground Floor, from 06/04/2025 to 10/04/2025. Documents will be handed over for a non-refundable fee of (30) K.D. payable at the Ministry of Finance treasury. The bidder will sign, at the time of receiving the terms and conditions booklet, a declaration and undertaking to adhere to the specified deadline for submitting the offer to the Central Sales Committee at the Ministry of Finance . 2- Inspection Date: (5) working days from 06/04/2025 – 10/04/2025. Inspection Time: from 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM. 3- Location for receiving those interested in auction inspection: Ministry of Finance – State Employees Housing Department – Transportation Control in Shuwaikh area (opposite Al-Bisher Garage ). 4- Date of Offer Submission and Envelope Opening: * Offer submission on Monday, 21/04/2025, at the Ministry of Finance – Ministries Complex – Block 12 – Third Floor – General Storage Affairs Department – Central Sales Department, according to the time specified for the bidder by the Ministry of Finance (No offer will be accepted after the specified time for the bidder has passed). * Envelope opening and auction holding on Tuesday, 22/04/2025, at the Ministry of Finance – Ministries Complex – Block 12 – Third Floor – General Storage Affairs Department. * Announcement of the successful bidder on the Ministry of Finance website on Tuesday, 22/04/2025. * Delivery of checks to bidders who were not awarded the auction on Wednesday, 23/04/2025. * The certified check / bank guarantee must be submitted in the name of the Ministry of Finance . Special Auction Conditions: 1. The bidder must be Kuwaiti – an individual or a company – registered in the Commercial Register and with the Kuwait Chamber of Commerce and Industry . It may be a foreigner, provided that they have a Kuwaiti partner or commercial agent with a notarized contract. (Must attach: copy of the Commercial and Industrial Register certificate, copy of the company license, copy of the civil ID, authorization letter approved by the Chamber of Commerce and Industry, and they must be valid). 2. Kuwaiti individuals are allowed to participate in the auction (A copy of the civil ID must be attached). 3. The Ministry of Finance is not responsible for transferring vehicle ownership to the successful bidder's name at the Ministry of Interior . To receive the auction terms and conditions booklet: please contact Ms. Fatima Al-Namusi and Ms. Sara Al-Kandari Tel: 99783639 – 22481206 Inspection site official: please contact Mr. Tariq Al-Muqassab , Tel: 99096885 and Mr. Tariq Al-Hussaili , Tel: 94407644 Central Sales Committee at the Ministry of Finance / Tel: (22481971) Website address: www.mof.gov.kw Undersecretary of the Ministry of Finance <footer>

Announcement Practice No. NCCAL - (1) / 2025/2026 Maintenance and Operation of Air Conditioning and Refrigeration Systems in the Buildings of the National Council for Culture, Arts and Letters And those specialized companies wishing to participate in this practice with the Authority K.D.) only seventy-five Kuwaiti Dinars , non-refundable, from the Financial Affairs Department – Contracts Section – Second Floor – Room (1) National Council Building, Martyrs Street – Sharq , within (10 working days) from the date of the announcement's issuance in the Official Gazette Al-Kuwait Al-Youm . A preliminary meeting will be held to answer bidders' inquiries on Thursday of the first week following the announcement's publication in the newspaper regarding the tender, at the main building of the General Secretariat of the National Council at 10:00 AM, with the necessity of bringing a copy of the tender receipt. Announcement Regarding Practice No. MWTAFA – (2) / 2026/2025 Maintenance of Security Surveillance Camera Systems and their Accessories for the Sites of the National Council for Culture, Arts and Letters The National Council for Culture, Arts and Letters announces the launching of Practice No. MWTAFA – 23 (2024/2025) Electronic Correspondence System. Specialized companies wishing to participate in this practice must obtain the practice documents for a non-refundable fee of (75 K.D.) only seventy-five Kuwaiti Dinars from the Financial Affairs Department – Contracts Section – Second Floor – National Council for Culture, Arts and Letters Building – Martyrs Street – Sharq . Please note that the last deadline for submitting bids is within (10 working days) from the date of the announcement's issuance in Al-Kuwait Al-Youm newspaper. All documents must be submitted on a (CD) in 3 copies, with the exception of (the bid form, preliminary insurance/bid bond, a copy of the purchase receipt, and the bidder's form). The bidding is indivisible, and no alternative offers will be accepted. * This announcement serves as an invitation for bidders wishing to attend the bid opening session, after coordination with the Procurement Control (Contracts Section ) before the specified date for the bid opening session. chunks.title: Announcement
chunks.text_en: The Public Authority for Industry announces that Messrs. / Abdulrahim Fadhel Mohammed Al-Kandari has applied for a lost replacement for License No.: 10982 Activity Type: Production of Interlocking Bricks and Tiles Under Commercial Name: Al-Amal Factory for Production of Interlocking Bricks and Tiles Registration No. in Register: 531 Date of Registration in Register: 2005/03/07 The initial guarantee amounts to (K.D. 5,170) and must be valid throughout the tender validity period and issued in the name of the Central Agency for Information Technology . Please bring the following documents to obtain the terms and conditions booklet: 1. Valid registration certificate with the Central Agency for Public Tenders . 2. Valid registration certificate with the Central Agency for Information Technology . 3. Valid certificate from the Public Authority for Civil Information (Civil Entity Number). 4. Valid national labor percentage fulfillment certificate. 5. Authorization letter and a copy of the civil ID for the company's representative to purchase the booklet. All documents must be submitted on a non-copyable CD, except for the tender format and initial insurance, which must be submitted as hard copies. A valid national labor percentage fulfillment certificate issued by the Public Authority for Manpower must be submitted with the tender. In accordance with Article 48 of Public Tenders Law No. 49 of 2016, which stipulates: "Tender envelopes shall be opened at the time and place specified in the tender documents in a public session attended by the tenderers or their representatives." The practice documents will be published on the Agency's website for review before proceeding to purchase the documents. In case of purchasing the documents and paying the prescribed fees, requests for fee refunds will not be accepted except in the event of the practice's cancellation in accordance with the provisions of Article (55) of the Public Tenders Law. This announcement serves as an invitation for interested practitioners to attend, as interested companies have the right to attend the envelope opening session. Interested companies wishing to attend must coordinate with the Tender Opening Department before the scheduled date of the tender opening session and bring the following documents: - 1. Copy of the civil ID. 2. Copy of the signature authorization for the Central Agency for Public Tenders . 3. If someone other than the authorized signatory attends, a written letter of authorization from the authorized signatory at the Central Agency for Public Tenders must be presented, delegating whomever they deem fit to attend the session. This announcement is considered an integral part of the practice documents. For more information, please visit our website WWW.CAPT.GOV.KW Secretary General of the Central Agency for Public Tenders

chunks.title: Kuwait Municipality <orig>بلدية الكويت</orig>
chunks.text_en:
Announcement (2025/40) The holder of the following license has submitted a request to the Municipality: Kuwait Municipality Tender Details | Commercial Name | Category | |:---|:------| | Abdul Hameed Al-Essa General Trading and Contracting Company | Tender Contractor | | Registration Number | 6200027 |
requesting the release of the company's bank guarantees deposited with the Municipality in consideration of its classification. Based on Article (19) of Municipality Resolution No. (2009/161) regarding the classification, licensing, and registration of construction and demolition contractors in Kuwait Municipality , which stipulates that a contractor may submit a request to the Municipality to cancel their registration before its expiry or to cancel the classification, and the committee stipulated in Article (1) of this regulation may issue its decision to that effect after fulfilling the following two conditions: 1- The contractor has completed all contracted works. 2- The lapse of fifteen (15) days from the date of publishing this request in the Official Gazette . The cancellation of the license or registration entails the return of the bank guarantee submitted by the contractor, taking into account the last paragraph of Article (10) of this resolution. Accordingly, the Municipality appeals to anyone who has any claims against the aforementioned contractor regarding construction contracting agreements concluded between them that have not yet been completed, or judicial attachments in their favor due to violating contracting works or dues arising from the contracting agreement, to review the Contractors Department at the Engineering Systems Department within a maximum period of fifteen days from this date. The Municipality will not consider any claims submitted after the prescribed period. Director General of the Municipality - This announcement is considered as an invitation for the willing tenderers, who are qualified by CAPT, to attend the opening of the bids envelopes, as the desired companies are entitled to attend. - Companies wishing to attend should coordinate with the Bid Opening Department before the day mentioned for the bid opening session and should bring the following documents: .1 Copy of Civil ID .2 A copy of the authorized signatory of CAPT. .3 In case that someone is present other than the person authorized to sign, a written letter must be brought from the authorized person, whom signature is approved by CAPT, authorizing whomever he sees fit to attend the session. - This declaration is considered an integral part of the tender documentation. - For more information, kindly visit our website: WWW.CAPT.GOV.KW Qualified companies / Tenderers by The central Agency for Public Tenders Operation, Management, Training, Maintenance Control & Oversight, Enhancement & Services Development of Air Navigation Services at Kuwait International Airport at Kuwait International Airport

chunks.title: Kuwait University <orig>جامعة الكويت</orig>
chunks.text_en:
Correction Announcement Kuwait University announces the offering of the following bid: Kuwait University Re-Tender Details | No. | Specifications | Requesting Entity | Amount | Closing Date | Initial Security Percentage | |:--|:---|:---|:------|:---|:---| | 1 | Re-offering of Bid No. 2024/17-2025 for the exploitation and management of Rest Area No. 5 to provide main and light food services, Kuwait University | Nutrition Department | 75 K.D. | 22/4/2025 | 2% of the total bid value |
Bid documents can be obtained starting from Sunday, 9/3/2025, and on subsequent days during official working hours from the Procurement Department's website https://pur.ku.edu.kw on a CD (3 copies), no later than 12:00 PM on Tuesday, 22/4/2025. Bids received after this deadline will not be considered. Bid opening will take place in a public session, with due regard for submitting the following: 1. The complete bid must be submitted, sealed with the company's stamp, on a CD (3 copies). 2. The following documents must be submitted for each of: - The original copy of the bid form and undertaking. - The original sealed price quotation. - The purchase receipt from the website. - A copy of the valid national labor percentage certificate. - The envelope designated for the bid. - Documents requested by the University in the bid documents. - The initial security deposit is 2% of the bid value. - Bids will be excluded if the required documents are not attached. - Bids are to be placed in the designated box at the Procurement Department - at Sabah Al-Salem University City (Shaddadiya) - Administration Building - 6th Floor - Supplier Affairs Section. Note: - Tender documents are to be collected by companies specialized in this field, provided they are registered with the Supplier Affairs Section at the University, from 8:00 AM until 12:00 PM. - The preliminary meeting will be held at the Nutrition Department - Sabah Al-Salem University City (Shaddadiya) - Administration Building - 6th Floor. Announcement Kuwait University Tender Announcements | No. | Requesting Entity | Amount | Tender No. | Site Visit Date | Preliminary Meeting Date | Closing Date | Initial Security Deposit | |:--|:---|:------|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---| | 1 | Nutrition Department | 75 K.D. | 2025/24-18 for the exploitation of the College of Sharia site (North Building - South Building) at Sabah Al-Salem University City to provide a single food service (coffee shop - packaged hot meals - light snacks) | 2025/4/27 10:30 AM | 2025/4/30 10:30 AM | 2025/5/13 | 2% of the total bid value |
Tender documents can be obtained starting from Sunday, 2025/4/13, and on subsequent days during official working hours from the Procurement Department's website (pur.ku.edu.kw). The deadline for submitting bids is Tuesday, 2025/5/13, at 12:00 PM. Bids received after this time will not be considered, and bids will be opened in a public session. 1. The complete bid must be submitted, sealed with the company's stamp, on a CD in (3 copies). 2. The following documents must be submitted for each: - The original copy of the bid form and undertaking. - The original stamped price quotation. - The purchase receipt from the website. - A copy of the valid national labor percentage certificate. - The envelope designated for the tender. - Documents requested by the University in the tender documents. - Initial security deposit of 2% of the bid value. - Bids will be excluded if the required documents are not attached. 3. Bids are to be placed in the designated box at the Procurement Department at Sabah Al-Salem University City (Shaddadiya) - Administration Building - 6th Floor - Supplier Affairs Section. Note: Tender documents are to be collected by companies specialized in this field, provided they are registered with the Supplier Affairs Section at the University, from 8:00 AM until 12:00 PM. The preliminary meeting will be held at the General National Guard Headquarters on (2025/4/21) in Al-Eid / Faisal Al-Jareed Building. The bidder, whether present or not, will be bound by all decisions, recommendations, or clarifications included in the meeting. Specialized companies and establishments participating in the tender must print the minutes of the preliminary meeting from the General National Guard Headquarters website (www.kng.gov.kw). Please note that the final deadline for submitting bids is at 1:00 PM on Tuesday, (2025/5/13). Note: - An authorization letter from the company/establishment to attend the meeting and the purchase receipt. - For any inquiries, please call the switchboard at (24999999) - Internal: (66769-66983) Fax: (24999858) - Mobile: (66270006). General National Guard Headquarters Announcement Tender No. (2025/2024-15) Launch The General National Guard Headquarters announces the launch of the tender for monitoring fuel disbursement and fuel tank surveillance, open to companies specialized in this field, according to the conditions stated in the tender documents. Therefore, companies and establishments wishing to participate in this tender must register on the General National Guard Headquarters website (www.kng.gov.kw) to purchase the tender documents for an amount of (75) K.D. only, seventy-five Kuwaiti Dinars only, non-refundable. Payment is made through the National Guard website using the (K-NET) service. A preliminary meeting will be held at 10:00 AM on Monday, this excludes alternative bids, which the tender conditions allow for submission. As for a person who has a share in separate companies, each independent with its legal personality, financial resources, engineers, employees, and administrative qualifications, they may, upon classification, register themselves and each of their independent companies. Any bid from a tenderer that violates this article shall be deemed null and void by judgment. * For any inquiries or requests related to the tender documents, these must be sent in writing via email no later than 10:00 AM on the day following the preliminary meeting. Requests submitted after this deadline will not be considered for any reason. * The value of the tender documents is non-refundable. * The preliminary bond must be valid throughout the bid validity period (90 days from the closing date) and submitted in favor of the Higher Purchasing Committee for Tenders of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation and its subsidiaries. * Bids must be addressed with the tender name and number and placed in the special bid box located at the headquarters of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation - Oil Sector Complex - Shuwaikh - Arabian Gulf Street - (Waiting Room) - next to Gate No. (1) before the aforementioned closing time. Any bid submitted after the specified closing time will be rejected. * The tenderer must be registered on the website of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation and its subsidiaries (ktendering.com.kw) and must submit a certificate proving this with the bid. * It is a condition for those wishing to participate in the tender to send a participation request via email (purch_contracts@kpc.com.kw) with only one PDF file attached, containing the following documents in the specified order: 1. A letter addressed to Kuwait Petroleum Corporation from the authorized signatory expressing the desire to participate, including the company's details as follows: Name of the person responsible for coordination between the Corporation and the tenderer. Direct phone number (mobile + landline). Email address (for the person + for the company). Fax number. Company address. 2. An official letter from the authorized signatory including the following: Names of persons authorized to sign on behalf of the company. Their job titles. Phone numbers (mobile + landline). Email addresses. 3. A copy of a valid certificate of compliance with the national labor percentage for non-governmental entities, issued and approved by the Public Authority for Manpower . 4. A copy of the company's articles of association in addition to the latest amendment contract (if any). 5. A copy of the commercial license from the Ministry of Commerce and Industry . 6. A recent letter (no older than 2022) containing the signature specimen of the person authorized to sign on behalf of the company, attested by the Kuwait Chamber of Commerce and Industry . 7. A copy of a valid registration certificate with the Kuwait Chamber of Commerce and Industry . 8. A copy of a valid registration certificate with the Central Agency for Public Tenders . 9. A copy of a valid registration certificate with the Central Agency for Information Technology .

chunks.title: Announcement <orig>إعلان</orig>
chunks.text_en:
The Supreme Purchasing Committee , upon the request of Kuwait National Petroleum Company - one of the subsidiaries of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation - announces the issuance of Tender No.: CB/CPC/2266 Steam Tracing for Sulphur Tanks - TK-23-101/102/103/104 in MAB Refinery In accordance with the general and special terms and conditions stipulated in the tender documents. These documents can be obtained by visiting the unified electronic commercial platform (K-Tendering portal) on the website of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation and its subsidiaries: ((https://ktendering.com.kw)) Tender Details for Steam Tracing for Sulphur Tanks | Issuance | Preliminary Meeting | Closing | Initial Security | Document Purchase Fee | |:------|:---|:-------|:---|:---| | 06/04/2025 | 21/04/2025 | 05/06/2025 | K.D. 15,000 | K.D. 500 | | | | | Valid for (90) days | |
The final deadline for submitting bids is Thursday, 5/6/2025, at 1:00 PM local time of the State of Kuwait (13:00 Noon), noting that bids must be submitted through the electronic commercial platform mentioned above. * The bidder must submit the initial security in favor of Kuwait National Petroleum Company in an envelope clearly marked with the tender name, address, and closing date. It should be placed in the designated box located on the first floor, reception hall, at the Kuwait National Petroleum Company Head Office building in Al-Ahmadi , no later than 1:00 PM (13:00 Noon) on Thursday, 5/6/2025, with a copy of the initial security attached to the bid. * The bidder must deposit the tender document purchase fee into the account of Kuwait National Petroleum Company : (KW59NBOK00000000000002004811204) and submit the receipt with the bid. Bids not accompanied by the payment receipt will be rejected. If the bid is submitted electronically, a copy of the payment receipt must be attached electronically with the bid. * Please note that this tender is restricted and non-divisible among the companies listed in the attached list. * Please note that a preliminary meeting for bidders will be held remotely (online via MS Teams application) at 10:00 AM on Monday, 21/4/2025, to answer bidders' inquiries. The meeting link - and other details for joining the meeting - will be sent to all bidders through the electronic commercial platform (K-Tendering portal), which bidders should regularly monitor for updates regarding the tender. * No single person or group of persons combined may register under more than one name during classification, or submit more than one bid in a tender, except for alternative bids where the tender conditions permit their submission. However, a person who has a share in separate companies, each independent with its legal personality, finances, engineers, employees, and general administrative apparatus, may, during classification, register himself and each of his independent companies. Any bid from a bidder violating this article shall be deemed null and void by operation of law, in accordance with Article No. (29) of Law No. (49) of 2016 regarding Public Tenders . Note: - * All required documents and certificates must be attached to the bid through the electronic commercial platform as specified in the tender documents. * The Supreme Purchasing Committee wishes to draw the attention of Messrs./Bidders who have inquiries or reservations regarding the technical specifications to submit such requests at most (three weeks) before the closing date (for this tender). These requests will be rejected and will not be considered for any reason after this deadline. To obtain a username and password to access the e-commerce platform, please call the following phone numbers: 23887794/23887792. cwphelp@knpc.com Illustrative guidelines on how to submit bids through the e-commerce platform are available on our website. However, a person who has a share in separate companies, each independent with its own legal personality, finances, engineers, employees, and general administrative apparatus, may, upon classification, register themselves and each of their independent companies. The bid of a tenderer who violates this article shall be deemed null and void by operation of law, in accordance with Article (29) of Law No. (49) of 2016 concerning Public Tenders . As for a person who has a share in separate companies, each independent with its legal personality, finances, engineers, employees, and general administrative apparatus, they may, upon classification, register themselves and each of their independent companies. - Any interested party whose name is not included in the list of companies invited to the tender has the right to appeal their exclusion or submit a request to participate in the tender, supported by relevant documents and addressed to Mr. / Chairman of the Higher Purchasing Committee for Tenders of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation and its Subsidiaries within (30) days from the date of this announcement. chunks.text_en:
Announcement of the Tender for Providing Technical Services with Specialized Technical Labor for the Liquefied Gas Filling Branch in Umm Al-Aish Area, affiliated with Kuwait Oil Tanker Company No.: GBU-ADM-03/2024 The Higher Procurement Committee for tenders of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation and its subsidiaries, upon request from Kuwait Oil Tanker Company (KOTC) – one of the subsidiaries of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation – announces the release of Local Tender No. GBU-ADM-03/2024 for providing technical services with specialized technical labor for the Liquefied Gas Filling Branch in Umm Al-Aish Area, affiliated with Kuwait Oil Tanker Company . This is in accordance with the terms and specifications contained in the tender documents. Tender documents can be obtained via the KPC & Subsidiaries K-Tendering Portal (ktendering.com.kw) website, starting from the date of publication of this announcement in the Official Gazette "Al-Kuwait Al-Youm" , upon payment of a non-refundable fee of K.D. 500 . This amount can be deposited in cash or transferred to the company's account mentioned below, in accordance with the tender data shown in the following table. A copy of the payment receipt must be provided to us via email at cadmin@kotc.com.kw, in addition to uploading a copy of the payment receipt to the K-Tendering Portal (ktendering.com.kw) electronic system. National Bank of Kuwait – Main Branch – Kuwait Account No.: 1000307805 IBAN: KW49NBOK0000000000001000307805 SWIFT: NBOKKWKW - Please note that this practice is general and indivisible, meaning that the supply must be from the manufacturer mentioned in the practice documents. - No single person or group of persons combined may register under more than one name during classification, or submit more than one bid in a tender, except for alternative bids where the tender conditions permit their submission. - However, a person who has a share in separate companies, each independent with its own legal personality, finances, engineers, employees, and general administrative apparatus, may, during classification, register himself and each of his independent companies. The bid of a tenderer who violates this article shall be deemed null and void by operation of law, in accordance with Article No. (29) of Law No. (49) of 2016 regarding Public Tenders . The tender envelope must bear the name and number of the tender, in addition to submitting all complete documents and papers, sealed and signed on all their pages by the authorized signatory of the company through the KPC & Subsidiaries K-Tendering Portal (ktendering.com.kw). Bids shall be valid for a period of (90) days from the closing date. The preliminary guarantee for this tender is K.D. 50,000/- and must remain valid throughout the validity period of the bid. All data regarding inquiries will be sent collectively and in writing via email. A preliminary meeting will be held to answer bidders' inquiries for all bidders on Monday, 28/04/2025. Note: * This tender is indivisible. * Bidders who have inquiries or reservations regarding the terms and technical specifications should note that the deadline for submitting their inquiries is tomorrow, Sunday, 27/04/2025. * Based on the text of Article (29) of Law No. (49) of 2016. * "No single person or group of persons acting together may register under more than one name during classification, or submit more than one bid in a tender, except for alternative bids where the tender conditions permit their submission. However, a person who has a share in separate companies, each independent with its own legal personality, finances, engineers, employees, and general administrative apparatus, may, during classification, register himself and each of his independent companies. The bid of a bidder who violates this article shall be deemed null and void by operation of law." * No bidder will be allowed to attend the preliminary meeting unless proof of purchase of the tender documents is provided. * The bidder must submit the preliminary security deposit in favor of Kuwait Oil Tanker Company . Please note that this tender is restricted to the following companies: Invited Companies | Sequence | Invited Companies | |:-------|:------------------|

chunks.title: Annual Plan for Supply, Contracting, and Services Contracts
chunks.text_en:
Kuwait Oil Company announces that, in accordance with Article No. (33) and Article No. (88) of Public Tenders Law No. 49/2016 regarding the subject of the above-mentioned announcement, plans are published weekly on the official website of Kuwait Oil Company . Therefore, all those wishing to view them should visit the website continuously to obtain the latest updates through the following steps: 1- Company Website WWW.KOCW.COM 2- Click on E-business 3- Select one of the options: Tenders (RFPs) and Purchases (RFQs). 4- Click on Upcoming Invited Companies for Tender | Serial | Invited Companies | |:-------|:---| | 1 | DUG TECHNOLOGY (AUSTRALIA) PTY LTD | | 2 | BGP INC CHINA NATIONAL PETROLEUM CORPORATION | | 3 | TGS GEOPHYSICAL COMPANY UK LTD |
The system or request shall be submitted at the headquarters of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation , Main Office - Higher Purchase Committee for Tenders of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation and its Subsidiaries. - And for the organizer not included in the above list, if submitting a system/subscription request, a fee of (-/250 K.D.) shall be paid for system/subscription requests for studying the possibility of adding them to that list. The system/subscription request fees shall be paid by bank deposit slip into the Kuwait Oil Company account mentioned below: BANK NAME: NATIONAL BANK OF KUWAIT, AHMADI BRANCH ACCOUNT NO.:1001058663 SWIFT CODE: NBOKKKWW IBAN: KW77NBOK0000000000001001058663 ACCOUNT NAME: KUWAIT OIL COMPANY OR BANK NAME: GULF BANK, FAHAHEEL BRANCH, KUWAIT . ACCOUNT NO.:8801243 SWIFT CODE: GULBKKWW IBAN: KW62GULB0000000000008801243. ACCOUNT NAME: KUWAIT OIL COMPANY - We would also like to draw the attention of the esteemed bidders/companies that, based on the text of Article (29) of Public Tenders Law 2016 regarding public tenders, "It is not permissible for one person or a group of persons combined to register under more than one name during classification or to submit more than one bid in a tender, except for alternative bids where the tender conditions allow their submission. However, a person who has a share in separate companies, each independent in its legal personality, finances, engineering, employees, and general administrative apparatus, may register himself and each of his independent companies during classification. The bid of a bidder who violates this article shall be considered null and void by operation of law." - To know the qualification bases and criteria or for any additional information, please visit the Unified Electronic Commercial Platform (K-Tendering Portal) on the website of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation and its subsidiaries: Https://www.ktendering.com.kw → Opportunities → Current Opportunities → Search for the RFP Title using the Filter.

BADER AL MULLA & BROTHERS SPC CO. for an amount of (1,243,960.880) K.D. (One Million, Two Hundred Forty-Three Thousand, Nine Hundred Sixty Kuwaiti Dinars and Eight Hundred Eighty Fils only) on the basis of (lowest prices) and whose offer conforms to the required terms and specifications, under a contract duration of (730) days.

chunks.title: Pre-offering of Limited Tenders to a List of Companies
chunks.text_en: The Higher Purchase Committee for Tenders of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation and its Subsidiaries announces, upon the request of Kuwait Oil Company , the offering of Tender No.: RFP- 2106873 **SEISMIC DATA PROCESSING SERVICES** In this regard, we draw attention to the fact that, based on the text of Article (16) of Tenders Law No. (49) of 2016 regarding public tenders, the above-mentioned tender/practice will be offered to the following list of companies, numbering (30), at least (30) days after the date of publication of this announcement in the Official Gazette (Kuwait Today / Al-Kuwait Al-Youm ) and on the company's website. Any interested party whose name is not included in the list of invited companies for the tender has the right to appeal their exclusion or submit a request to participate in the tender, accompanied by supporting documents and addressed to Mr. / Chairman of the Higher Purchase Committee for Tenders of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation and its Subsidiaries, within (30) days from the date of this announcement.
